'''Winfrid Dagore''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]] who served in the [[Teth/Legends|Tethan]] [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|resistance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Along with her aide, [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Palob Godalhi/Legends|Palob Godalhi]], she once met with [[Bria Tharen]] of the [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] resistance to discuss working with the Corellians in open rebellion against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. She felt that Teth's location in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] meant that they would not be of great assistance to any organized resistance, but did agree to increase raids on Imperial vessels and munitions dumps and to help supply the Corellians with the stolen weapons.

An Imperial [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] was posted on her head, for which she was captured by [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] [[Dace Bonearm]] and [[IG-72]] in a gambit employing the [[HWK-290 light freighter/Legends|HWK-290 light freighter]] [[Moldy Crow/Legends|''Moldy Crow'']] as a decoy.<ref name="Dark Forces">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20050407b|series=The Dark Forces Saga|text=Part 2: Unsung Heroes of the Light}}</ref>
